question:
Which of the following answers describe the Twisted Nematic (TN) technology? (Select 3 answers)

Low viewing angles
Fast response times
Low color quality
High color quality
Slow response times
Wide viewing angles
canonical_answer:
Low viewing angles

Fast response times

Low color quality
